import json, re, unicodedata, difflib, pathlib, pprint, itertools, math
import json, re, unicodedata, difflib, pathlib, pprint, itertools, math, os, glob, sys

qpath="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hpath="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
len(q)

# Build normalized search
import unicodedata, re

def normalize(s):
    # remove diacritics and tatweel, punctuation, normalize hamza forms
    s = s.replace('ـ','')
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0600-\u06FF\s]', ' ', s)
    # remove diacritics
    arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = re.sub(arabic_diacritics, '', s)
    # unify hamza forms?
    s = s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    s = re.sub(r'\s+',' ', s).strip()
    return s

norm_texts=[(i, v['ayah_text'], normalize(v['ayah_text'])) for i,v in enumerate(q)]
snip="وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا مِنْكُمْ"
ns=normalize(snip)
matches=[(i,orig) for i,orig,n in norm_texts if ns in n]
len(matches)

# try substrings / tokens
tokens=set(normalize("وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا إِلَيْكُمْ رَسُولًا مِنْكُمْ تُؤْمِزُونَهُ عَلَيْكُمْ ضُرُباً وَتَوَلَوْنَهُ").split())
cands=[]
for i,orig,n in norm_texts:
    ntokens=set(n.split())
    inter=len(tokens & ntokens)
    if inter>=3:
        cands.append((inter, i, orig))
cands_sorted=sorted(cands, reverse=True)[:20]
[(k, i, normalize(o)[:80]) for k,i,o in cands_sorted[:10]]
